parts.text:
{
  "situation_update": "As Khokaar attempts to jam the main entrance's security panel, a hidden alarm blares through the bank, shaking the entire building. Before anyone can react, a quick response unit, already staging nearby, breaches the entrance, catching Khokaar by surprise.",
  "vault_delta": 2,
  "police_alert_delta": 2,
  "team_caught": "Khokaar",
  "team_action": "The crew's initial attempt to neutralize the entrance security goes horribly wrong, triggering a full bank alarm."
}
